name: Pimp Player Hustler Gangster Crips
description: Crips, are an African-American street gang operating on the East Side of San Bernardino, California. They originated in the mid-1980’s, during the crack epidemic era. The PPHG Crips are also associated with the number 4x (4’s), similar to gangs under the 2x (Deuces)

sources.title: Pimp Player Hustler Gangster Crips — UnitedGangs
